prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次依次为约4064名→4104名→3977名→4172名→3587名，整体呈波动走势。2025年位次大幅前移至3587名，较2024年的4172名前移约 585名，为近五年最佳录取位次，反映出当年报考热度明显上升；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为57人，2025年增至58人，2026年进一步扩至60人，较2025年增加2人（+3.4%）。小幅扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第84 名，近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属于中上水平211院校。学校以能源电力为特色，行业认可度高；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档异常事件；抖 音热度处于一般水平，未进入全国高校热度前100名，短视频平台关注度不高，报考热度主要依靠学校自身实力和行业地位驱动；第五轮学科评估中，电气工程 获评A，动力工程及工程热物理获评A-，均为学校王牌学科。电气类专业在2024年专业热度分析中被评为"高热推荐"，能源动力类专业被评为"推荐"，相关专业社会关注度持续走高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、能源动力类等核心专业社会热度持续升温，碳中和背景下电力行业人才需求旺盛。海南 省2026年高考考生总数约78000人（较2025年67408人增长约15.7%），考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。海南省本科批2025年为480分，近年基本稳定在480–483分 区间。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势表现、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+2人）、海南省考生总数显著增长（+15.7%）以 及电气类专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧。，考虑考生规模扩大带来的竞争压力，预测2026年最低录取位次约3631名，较 2025年小幅前移（更难进），位次区间3131–4131名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3631名，区间3131–4131名。位次在区间下限（3131名）以上的考生可重点冲刺一档电气类王牌专业；位次在3631名附近的考生应以二档专业为主攻方向，兼顾一档冲 刺；位次在区间上限（4131名）附近的考生建议以三档专业保底，同时争取二档中位次要求较低的专业。电气类专业为该校核心竞争力，学科评估A级且社会热度持续走高，报考 竞争最为激烈。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province were approximately 4064 → 4104 → 3977 → 4172 → 3587, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2025, the ranking significantly advanced to 3587, moving forward by about 585 places compared to 4172 in 2024, marking the best admission ranking in the past five years, reflecting a notable increase in application popularity. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province was 57 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 58 in 2025, and further expanded to 60 in 2026, an increase of 2 students (+3.4%) compared to 2025. The slight expansion helps alleviate competition to some extent, but the effect is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable range of 75–84 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 institutions. The university is characterized by energy and electric power, with high industry recognition. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission incidents. Douyin popularity is at an average level, not in the top 100 national university popularity, with low attention on short video platforms; application popularity is mainly driven by the university's own strength and industry status. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering was rated A, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics was rated A-, both being flagship disciplines. In the 2024 professional popularity analysis, electrical majors were rated as 'highly recommended', and energy and power majors as 'recommended', with related majors gaining increasing social attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Energy and Power, continue to see rising social popularity. Under the carbon neutrality background, demand for talent in the electric power industry is strong. The total number of examinees for the 2026 Hainan Province college entrance exam is about 78,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025), with a significant expansion in examinee scale, intensifying overall competition. The Hainan Province undergraduate batch cutoff in 2025 was 480 points, remaining stable in the 480–483 range in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the significant ranking advance in 2025, the slight expansion of enrollment plan in 2026 (+2 students), the notable increase in total examinees in Hainan Province (+15.7%), and the sustained high popularity of electrical majors, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025. Taking into account the competitive pressure from the expanded examinee scale, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 3631, slightly forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025, with a ranking range of 3131–4131.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3631, range 3131–4131. Candidates with rankings above the lower limit of the range (3131) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 electrical flagship majors; candidates near 3631 should target Tier 2 majors as the main direction, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit of the range (4131) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also striving for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. Electrical majors are the core competitiveness of the university, with A-level discipline evaluation and continuously rising social popularity, making admission competition the most intense.
